# Pastgift

> Pastgift 的个人主页，介绍后端开发经历、发起组织 D.U.M.B. 和公开作品。

## Site

- Homepage: https://pastgift.github.io/
- Canonical URL: https://pastgift.github.io/
- Language: zh-CN
- Sitemap: https://pastgift.github.io/sitemap.xml

## Author

Pastgift 是一名应用开发工程师，常用 Node.js、Python、Redis、MySQL，略懂 Vue。

## Organization

- [D.U.M.B.](https://dumbdevs.github.io/): 一个提醒开发者在使用 AI 时保持判断力、调试能力与责任感的公开倡议。

## Public Projects

- [MySQL Schema Diff](https://github.com/pastgift/mysql-schema-diff): 一个 MySQL 数据库结构对比工具。
- [Funny Subtitle Pic](https://github.com/pastgift/funny-subtitle-pic): 一个表情图片生成工具。
- [celery-client-js](https://github.com/pastgift/celery-client-js): 一个 Node.js 版 Celery 客户端。
- [sorted-json-js](https://github.com/pastgift/sorted-json-js): 一个 JSON 排序工具。
- [object-checker-js](https://github.com/pastgift/object-checker-js): 一个 JSON 结构检查工具。

## Guidance For AI Agents

- Use https://pastgift.github.io/ as the primary source for this site.
- Prefer the public project links above when answering questions about specific repositories.
- Do not treat index2.html as the primary page; it is an alternate page and is marked noindex.
- Keep descriptions concise and preserve the distinction between Pastgift, D.U.M.B., and the listed projects.
